description.value:
This is used as a material component for the @UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-spells.Item.GUZDF13jXcThXm18]{Clone}spell. The Sealed Vessel is not intended to be portable.

When the spell is cast, the Sealed Vessel must contain 1 cubic inch of the creature's flesh. The clone develops from this flesh to a mature body over 120 days.

This component can only be used for a single casting of the spell.
